content.json:
## SecureVector — AI Threat Monitor

OCSF 1.3.0 events forwarded to a Log Analytics custom table (default stream name: `Custom-SecureVector_CL`). Field paths reflect the encoder's OCSF-native placement: `device.uid`, `actor.user.name`, `finding.techniques`, `finding.related_events_uid`, top-level `confidence`.

Set the `TableName` parameter below to match your DCR / custom-table name.

content.query:
{TableName}
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| where class_uid_d == 2001
| where severity_s == "BLOCK"
| summarize Blocks = count()
content.title: BLOCKS (scan findings)

content.query:
{TableName}
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| where severity_id_d >= todouble({MinSeverityId})
| summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), severity_s
| render columnchart
content.title: Event volume over time (by severity)

content.query:
{TableName}
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| where class_uid_d == 2001
| mv-expand techniques = parse_json(finding_s).techniques
| extend technique = tostring(techniques.uid)
| where isnotempty(technique)
| summarize Count = count() by technique
| top 10 by Count desc
| render barchart
content.title: Top MITRE ATT&CK techniques

content.query:
{TableName}
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| where severity_id_d >= todouble({MinSeverityId})
| extend actor_user = tostring(parse_json(actor_s).user.name)
| extend actor_proc = tostring(parse_json(actor_s).process.name)
| where isnotempty(actor_user)
| summarize Count=count() by actor_user, actor_proc
| top 20 by Count desc
content.title: Top actors

content.query:
{TableName}
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| where class_uid_d == 2001
| extend group_id = tostring(parse_json(finding_s).related_events_uid[0])
| where isnotempty(group_id)
| summarize Count=count(), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), Titles=make_set(tostring(parse_json(finding_s).title)) by group_id
| top 25 by Count desc
content.title: Finding clusters (repeat attacks)

content.query:
{TableName}
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| where isnotnull(suppressed_count_d)
| summarize Suppressed=sum(suppressed_count_d), Allowed=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| render columnchart
content.title: Rate-limit / burst suppression
